entries.speaker: Detective Cyto Kine
entries.text: Tell me this portal has a better sense of direction than our fake map.
entries.purpose: Launch the entry beat with character voice.

entries.text: Even before the culprit appears, the liver landscape carries signs of chronic strain.
entries.purpose: Teach background liver damage without embedding visible text in art.

entries.speaker: Deputy Pip
entries.text: That district is rewriting the neighborhood. Follow it, but do not name it yet.
entries.purpose: Land the first major clue while preserving reveal timing.
